'''Saelt-Marae's mate''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkora]] who had mated with [[Saelt-Marae/Legends|Saelt-Marae]], a member of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] court. Their relationship was documented in a collection of digital recordings made by Marae, which were discovered on an unnamed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{Char-stub}}
